title: Unicode, Language, Tokenization, Fields, and Citation Offsets · Independent Program Trial
summary: An independent team receives a different corpus, query mix, relevance policy, language set, access model, latency budget, harm profile, and evidence duty and transfers unicode, language, tokenization, fields, and citation offsets into a new reversible multilingual text pipeline. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of reversible multilingual text pipeline with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practic…
objectives: Choose and version Unicode normalization per field while retaining original text and testing canonical and compatibility distinctions.
Detect or receive language and apply language- and script-appropriate word, subword, character, or morphological tokenization.
Separate title, heading, body, code, identifier, date, author, tenant, and access metadata with explicit weighting and filter semantics.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""rag-retrieval-augmented-generation cumulative evidence-grounded retrieval portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python models and fixed fixtures only.
Native ML packages, files, models, vector stores, provider APIs, networks, credentials,
OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production effects require authorized transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RagEvidence:
    corpus_version: str
    document_id: str
    chunk_id: str
    query_id: str
    source_span: str


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RetrievalBoundary:
    tenant_id: str
    authorized: bool
    answerable: bool
    context_budget: int


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python RAG engineering portfolio ready"

steps.title: RAG and Python Commit to the mission model · Lab Rag Unicode Normalization Policy
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab RAG engineering team handles case 1051 during a regulated document deletion request. Build deterministic Python evidence to normalize and tokenize multilingual fields without losing source text or citation offsets; keep browser execution pure, deterministic, bounded, and free of model, vector-database, network, file, credential, and host effects; then move the only supporting passage to the middle of the context and rerun the position slice. Browser code uses pure bounded models and fixed fixtures only. Native Python packages, embedding or generation models, vector databases, files, networks, credentials, provider APIs, OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Choose and version Unicode normalization per field while retaining original text and testing canonical and compatibility distinctions.

What must be established before implementation?

steps.title: RAG and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Lab Rag Offset Lineage
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: rag-offset-lineage-1vzmf3" that uses case 1796 to normalize and tokenize multilingual fields without losing source text or citation offsets. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not import third-party packages, load models, open files or sockets, contact vector databases or provider APIs, read credentials or host state, execute commands, or cause external effects; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, pinned native packages, evaluated models, disposable data and indexes, controlled services, load, fault, recovery, security, accessibility, and production gates.

Evidence target: RAG and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Lab Rag Offset Lineage.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Rag Offset Lineage into observable performance evidence. For RAG and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Lab Rag Offset Lineage, keep Rag Offset Lineage connected to executable Python retrieval, grounding, evaluation, and evidence decision evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: rag-offset-lineage-1vzmf3
# Competency: rag-offset-lineage.
# Case 1796: a multimodal maintenance-manual release.
# Operating constraint: preserve source provenance, tenant authorization, deletion, freshness, citation offsets, and untrusted-data separation.
# Changed case: change tenant, language, date, and document version and reject stale or unauthorized evidence.
def evidence_rag_offset_lineage_1vzmf3(original: str = "Café API v2", normalized: str = "café api v2", language: str = "fr", field_count: int = 3, offsets_preserved: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_1vzmf3 = "1vzmf3-3fmzv1-1796"
    assert evidence_variant_1vzmf3
    evidence_axes_1vzmf3 = (
        "corpus1vzmf3",
        "query3fmzv1",
        "tenant1796",
        "index1vzmf31796",
        "prompt3fmzv11796",
        "evaluation17961vzmf3",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_1vzmf3)) == 6
    if not original or not normalized:
        return False, 0, "empty-text"
    if not language or field_count < 1:
        return False, field_count, "language-fields"
    if not offsets_preserved:
        return False, len(normalized), "citation-offsets"
    tokens = tuple(part for part in normalized.split() if part)
    if not tokens:
        return False, 0, "tokenization"
    assert "v2" in tokens
    return True, len(tokens), "unicode-field-model"
